---
title: "1D Gaussian Mixture Clustering Simulation Dashboard"
subtitle: "Comparison of discrepancy measures and refinement strategies"
author: "Alexander"
date: "March 2026"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    page-layout: full
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 15           # ← wider default figures
    fig-height: 9
    embed-resources: true          # single self-contained file
params:
  results_dir: "results/simstudy/1D"
  scenario_filter: !expr c("scen1", "scen2")
  method_filter: !expr c("KS", "Pearson", "Wasserstein")
  clusterwise_filter: !expr c(TRUE, FALSE)
  version_filter: !expr c("grid", "quantile")
  nsweet_min: 1
  nsweet_max: 5
  nms_min: 0
  nms_max: 5
  alpha0_min: 2
  alpha0_max: 5
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(DT)
library(patchwork)   # optional, for combining plots if needed

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, fig.align = "center")



```

Simulation Scenarios
Scenario 1 – Moderately overlapping components
```{r}

scen1 <- local({
  set.seed(1)
  N <- 100; K <- 3
  mu_true <- c(-2, 0, 1)
  sd_true <- c(1, 2, 1) * 0.2
  w_true  <- c(0.3, 0.5, 0.2)
  cl_true <- rep(1:K, round(w_true * N))
  y <- numeric(N)
  for (k in seq_len(K)) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx] <- rnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k], sd_true[k])
  }
  tibble(y = y, cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

scen1 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y)) +
  geom_density(fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_rug(aes(colour = cluster), sides = "b", length = unit(0.04, "npc")) +
  geom_point(aes(y = 0, colour = cluster), 
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.015), 
             size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", end = 0.9) +
  labs(title = "Scenario 1", subtitle = "K = 3, N = 100, unequal variances", 
       x = "Observed values", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```

Scenario 2 – Well-separated components

```{r}

scen2 <- local({
  set.seed(2)
  N <- 150; K <- 4
  mu_true <- c(-4, -1, 1, 4)
  sd_true <- rep(0.5, 4)
  w_true  <- rep(0.25, 4)
  cl_true <- rep(1:K, round(w_true * N))
  y <- numeric(N)
  for (k in seq_len(K)) {
    idx <- cl_true == k
    y[idx] <- rnorm(sum(idx), mu_true[k], sd_true[k])
  }
  tibble(y = y, cluster = factor(cl_true))
})

scen2 |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y)) +
  geom_density(fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_rug(aes(colour = cluster), sides = "b", length = unit(0.04, "npc")) +
  geom_point(aes(y = 0, colour = cluster), 
             position = position_jitter(height = 0.015), 
             size = 1.6, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", end = 0.9) +
  labs(title = "Scenario 2", subtitle = "K = 4, N = 150, equal variances", 
       x = "Observed values", y = "Density") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```


```{r}

results_dir <- params$results_dir
files <- list.files(results_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

all_results <- map_dfr(files, readRDS) |>
  mutate(
    scenario_label = case_when(
      scenario == "scen1" ~ "Scenario 1 (moderate overlap)",
      scenario == "scen2" ~ "Scenario 2 (well separated)",
      TRUE ~ scenario
    ),
    clusterwise_label = if_else(clusterwise, "Yes", "No")
  )


filtered <- all_results |>
  filter(
    scenario %in% params$scenario_filter,
    method %in% params$method_filter,
    clusterwise %in% params$clusterwise_filter,
    version %in% params$version_filter,
    n_sweet >= params$nsweet_min,
    n_sweet <= params$nsweet_max,
    n_ms >= params$nms_min,
    n_ms <= params$nms_max,
    alpha_0 >= params$alpha0_min,
    alpha_0 <= params$alpha0_max
  )
filtered |>
  group_by(scenario_label, method, clusterwise_label, version, n_sweet, n_ms, alpha_0) |>
  summarise(
    `N runs`       = n(),
    `Mean ARI`     = mean(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `SD ARI`       = sd(ARI, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(3),
    `Mean D`       = mean(final_D, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(4),
    `Mean sweets`  = mean(n_accepted_sweets, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean merges`  = mean(n_accepted_merges, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    `Mean splits`  = mean(n_accepted_splits, na.rm = TRUE) |> round(1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  DT::datatable(
    options = list(
      pageLength = 12,
      dom = "Bfrtip",
      buttons = c("csv", "excel")
    ),
    extensions = "Buttons",
    filter = "top",
    caption = "Summary statistics (filtered)"
  )
```



Visualisations
1. ARI by method, clusterwise computation and n_sweet

```{r}

filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = method, y = ARI, colour = factor(n_sweet))) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_grid(scenario_label ~ clusterwise_label, labeller = label_both) +
  #scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "C", name = "n_sweet") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index by discrepancy measure, clusterwise aggregation and sweetening iterations",
    y = "ARI", x = "Discrepancy measure"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```


2. ARI by n_sweet, n_ms and method


```{r}
filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(n_sweet), y = ARI, colour = factor(n_ms))) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_grid(scenario_label ~ method, labeller = label_both) +
  #scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "plasma", name = "n_ms") +
  labs(
    title = "Adjusted Rand Index by sweetening iterations, merge-split cycles and method",
    x = "n_sweet", y = "ARI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
```


3. ARI by alpha₀, method and clusterwise

```{r}

filtered |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(alpha_0), y = ARI, colour = method)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.25, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.22, dodge.width = 0.75),
             size = 2.6, alpha = 0.9) +
  facet_grid(scenario_label ~ clusterwise_label, labeller = label_both) +
  #scale_colour_viridis_d(option = "viridis", name = "Method") +
  labs(
    title = expression("Adjusted Rand Index by prior concentration" ~ alpha[0] ~ ", method and clusterwise computation"),
    x = expression(alpha[0]), y = "ARI"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

```
